title: Database
description: Schema for database.json — system-discovered mod, game, and Steam library data. Field dictionary sourced from DATABASE_FIELDS.md (merged 2026-05-08).

OS.description: Operating system path style configuration. Contains workingpathstyle and steamlibpathstyle to handle cross-platform path normalization between Linux and Windows.

steamlib.description: List of discovered Steam library paths. Each entry corresponds to a steamapps directory. CRUD operations are always allowed (create: add manual lib path; read: query current lib paths and source status; update: modify lib path and sync related game/dommod paths; delete: remove lib path and cascade-remove game/dommod no longer belonging to any lib).

game.description: List of installed games discovered from appmanifest ACF files across all Steam libraries.

dommod.description: List of dominant mod entries (optional). Each entry represents a mod identified by mixed_id (appid:modid format). Populated during workshop/custom mod discovery.

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings generated during database generation or discovery (e.g., duplicate appids, missing ACF files, parsing issues).

history.description: UI state container; structure is intentionally loose and evolves with the GUI. May contain locale settings, panel layout ratios, and other persistent UI preferences.

workingpathstyle.description: Path style of the current working/runtime environment. Determines how file paths are normalized before processing.

steamlibpathstyle.description: Original path style of the discovered Steam library. Used to detect cross-platform library paths (e.g., WSL accessing Windows Steam libraries).

SteamLib.description: A discovered Steam library (corresponds to a steamapps directory). Each library may contain multiple installed games and is optionally the master discovery point holding libraryfolders.vdf.

path.description: Absolute path to the steamapps directory. This is the root for scanning appmanifest and appworkshop ACF files.

contains_libraryfolders_vdf.description: True when this steamapps path contains the master libraryfolders.vdf file for expanded library discovery. Only one library per system typically has this flag set to true.

game.description: List of appid strings installed in this library. These appids are used to scope workshop mod discovery (greedy_parsing off: only parse mods for these appids; greedy_parsing on: allow broader parsing).

Game.description: An installed game entry discovered from an appmanifest ACF file. Contains metadata about the game's install location and discovered workshop content.

appid.description: Steam Application ID. Used as the primary key for matching rules and aggregating mod information.

name.description: Human-readable game name as extracted from the appmanifest ACF file (field: 'name').

localdate.description: Unix timestamp of the game's last local update (from appmanifest LastUpdated field). Used for backup_id generation and change detection.

basepath.description: Game install base path (the 'installdir' from appmanifest). MUST end with a forward slash. This is the directory containing the game's executable and assets.

modpath.description: Workshop mod content path for this game (steamapps/workshop/content/<appid>/). MUST end with a forward slash. Used as the base directory for discovering installed workshop mods.

mods_found.description: List of modid/contentid strings discovered for this game from appworkshop ACF files. Each entry corresponds to a workshop mod installed for this game.

DomMod.description: A dominant/local mod entry. Represents a mod that has been identified either through workshop discovery or manual registration. The mixed_id uniquely identifies the mod across the system.

mixed_id.description: Colon-separated composite identifier in the format 'appid:modid'. This is the authoritative key for referencing mods across rules, mappings, and the database.

localdate.description: Unix timestamp of the mod's last local modification time. Used for backup_id generation (fallback when workshop ACF timeupdated is unavailable) and change detection.

path.description: Absolute path to the mod directory. MUST end with a forward slash. This is the filesystem root for the mod's installed content.
